entries.name: Meaningful ambient decoration
entries.description: Avoid blurred color orbs that carry no product meaning.
entries.badExample: Place glowing blobs behind every screen.
entries.goodExample: Use decoration only when it supports identity or state.

provenance.note: Maintainer-reviewed project guidance; not a detector or universal quality claim.

entries.name: Purposeful color transitions
entries.description: Avoid gradients without hierarchy, state, or brand meaning.
entries.badExample: Apply a rainbow gradient to every primary surface.
entries.goodExample: Use solid semantic surfaces unless a gradient carries meaning.

provenance.note: Maintainer-reviewed project guidance; not a detector or universal quality claim.

entries.name: Restrained container rounding
entries.description: Avoid rounded containers when spacing or dividers already group content.
entries.badExample: Nest every label, metric, and row inside rounded cards.
entries.goodExample: Reserve rounded containers for meaningful boundaries.

provenance.note: Maintainer-reviewed project guidance; not a detector or universal quality claim.

entries.name: Purposeful pill shapes
entries.description: Avoid detached pills for every label, status, and action.
entries.badExample: Render every small element as a floating pill.
entries.goodExample: Reserve pills for compact states or choices.

provenance.note: Maintainer-reviewed project guidance; not a detector or universal quality claim.

entries.name: Content-shaped composition
entries.description: Avoid forcing unrelated content into an equal-card grid.
entries.badExample: Place every item in an equal card.
entries.goodExample: Let task priority shape hierarchy and grouping.

provenance.note: Maintainer-reviewed project guidance; not a detector or universal quality claim.

entries.name: Task-proportional headings
entries.description: Avoid hero copy that displaces the primary task.
entries.badExample: Fill a routine screen with a promotional headline.
entries.goodExample: Keep orientation concise and the primary task visible.

provenance.note: Maintainer-reviewed project guidance; not a detector or universal quality claim.

entries.name: Task-linked metrics
entries.description: Avoid generic metrics disconnected from the product task.
entries.badExample: Fill the screen with interchangeable vanity metrics.
entries.goodExample: Show metrics that support a named user decision.

provenance.note: Maintainer-reviewed project guidance; not a detector or universal quality claim.

entries.name: Intentional emphasis hierarchy
entries.description: Avoid giving every element the same visual weight.
entries.badExample: Use equal emphasis for every action and metric.
entries.goodExample: Reserve strongest emphasis for the primary task.

provenance.note: Maintainer-reviewed project guidance; not a detector or universal quality claim.
